name: rvv-source-bundle-ssh-runtime-abi-proof
title: RVV source-bundle ssh runtime ABI proof
description: Prove the production RVV source-front-door object/header/bundle is externally consumable by an ssh rvv C harness.
creator: codex
notes: Completed by refreshing real ssh rvv evidence for the existing bounded RVV i32m1 add source bundle. Generated object/header/index came from tcrv-translate --tcrv-source-artifact-bundle-front-door; the external harness consumed only the generated header and object and passed n=7,16,23 on rvv. No compiler source change was required and no descriptor/direct-C/source-export/wrapper path was added.
